hero_title: Your Medical Identity, One Scan Away
hero_subtitle: Store your vital medical information securely and share it instantly via QR code in emergencies.
feature_qr_desc: Generate a scannable QR code that links to your critical medical information for first responders.
feature_records_desc: Upload and organize prescriptions, lab reports, and medical documents in one secure place.
feature_reminders_desc: Never miss a medication dose or an upcoming appointment with timely reminders.
feature_health_desc: Track blood pressure, blood sugar, weight, and other vitals over time.
feature_contacts_desc: Responders can instantly reach your emergency contacts from your QR profile.
feature_multilang_desc: Use MediSync in your preferred language — currently English and German.
cta_title: Ready to secure your health information?
cta_subtitle: Create your free MediSync profile in under 5 minutes.
about_subtitle: A smart medical identity platform built for emergencies and everyday health management.
about_mission_desc: Make critical medical information instantly accessible during emergencies while keeping everyday health management simple and private.
about_open_desc: MediSync is built with modern open-source technologies. Your data stays yours.
about_privacy_desc: Confidential records are never shown on public emergency pages. You control what responders see.
about_accessible_desc: Works on any device with a browser — no app install required for scanning or viewing emergency profiles.
help_subtitle: Find answers to common questions and ways to reach us
camps_subtitle: Discover free health camps and awareness events near you
geo_subtitle: Find nearby hospitals and emergency services
auth_login_subtitle: Sign in to your MediSync account
verify_subtitle: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click it to activate your account.
verify_subtitle_noemail: We sent a verification link to your email address. Click it to activate your account.
verify_spam: Can't find the email? Check your spam or junk folder.
verify_not_yet: Email not yet verified. Please click the link in your inbox first.
